privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data with 5 photography locations having optimal golden hour start times ranging from 17:30 to 18:30 (60-minute span). All locations have a constant 5-minute setup time, with variable travel times (8-20 minutes). The data is intentionally scrambled by location name order but must be sorted by optimal start time in ascending order. When properly sorted and cumulative arrival times calculated, the total schedule span is 70 minutes (17:30 to 18:40), well within the verifier's 90-minute window check. The task has a 180-second timeout, max 15 steps, requires formulas (not hardcoded values), and passes at 75% threshold (3 of 4 criteria). Golden hour in photography typically lasts 40-90+ minutes depending on latitude, making a 70-minute schedule realistic.
